---
name: Scan problem (missed or wrong jobs)
about: A scan found too few jobs, the wrong jobs, or reported something confusing
labels: scan
---

**Careers page URL**


**What the panel's funnel showed** — please copy every row and number:

```
Collecting the jobs — N pages scanned        NNN
Picking which jobs are worth reading          NN
Reading job descriptions                   NN of NN
Comparing them to your resume              NN of NN
Added to your Jobs tab                         N
```

**Any warning band text** (the orange box):


**What the site itself said its job count was** (e.g. "Displaying 1 to 20 of 463"):


**What you expected instead**


> Scan bugs are almost always an undercount, and the numbers above are what
> make them diagnosable. "It found fewer than it should" is very hard to act
> on without them.
